title: POST /api/v1/apps — OAuth2 app registration
description: Implement Mastodon app registration endpoint. Clients POST their name, redirect_uri, scopes, and website. Returns client_id (UUID), client_secret (random), and vapid_key (empty string — clients handle absence). Store in oauth_apps table.
design: client_id: UUID v4. client_secret: 32 random bytes, base64url. vapid_key: empty string (not supported). Scopes stored as space-separated string. Return 200 with JSON matching Mastodon's Application object shape.
acceptance_criteria: Ivory and Phanpy can register themselves against the instance; response includes client_id, client_secret, redirect_uri, scopes, name; duplicate registrations create new rows (clients may re-register)
